blocks.text: Glimt at San Siro — Norway's greatest Champions League night beckons

Bodø/Glimt carry a stunning 3-1 first-leg lead to San Siro. NRK and TV2 are already running the numbers — this club now ranks among the world's elite by key metrics. Win tonight and Norwegian football enters a new era.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) and MANA take on 100 Thieves in DraculaN Season 5
